conversations.say: Mira, we disclosed the meeting together; now the matched calendar and authorization records must leave our control.
conversations.offer: I will transfer my calendar half to independent counsel and fund the authorization review.
conversations.request: Transfer your preserved authorization half to the same counsel, accept joint responsibility for process failures, and publish the review without controlling its findings.

conversations.say: Maren, labor should govern the remedy rather than merely advise City Hall.
conversations.offer: I will fund anonymous reporting, representation, nonretaliation, and independently administered remedies regardless of any finding about R, Vale, or an article.
conversations.request: Name worker representatives to co-design eligibility, select the independent administrator, and audit compliance.

conversations.say: Inez, I will open the protected City Hall doorway you requested, with labor at the table and the neighborhood controlling what may be quoted.
conversations.offer: I will schedule the Rafi review meeting with labor representation, no private payment, no compelled naming, nonretaliation, and community review of quotations in writing.
conversations.request: Broker Rafi's participation and publicly support the review once those written terms are delivered.

public_statement: City Hall will fund protected reporting, worker-chosen remedies, community participation, and independent authorization review in every ending. Verified worker harm warrants action; it does not prove a complete article, identify R, or establish Vale's fate. The route ends after an automated intervention, but absence is not a body and intervention is not intent.

commitments.promise: Fund and submit to an independently counseled review of the restored calendar and authorization chain, with publication outside City Hall and Parallax control.
Fund worker-chosen anonymous reporting, representation, nonretaliation, and remedies regardless of the final reconstruction.
Put the protected Rafi–City Hall meeting terms in writing and require labor representation and community review of quotations.

correction: The automated intervention is evidence of an event, not proof of autonomous intent or that an AI killed Vale; the unresolved trail supports no definitive fate claim.
goal_progress: Secured institutional cooperation from C05 through matched-record review and shared responsibility.
Secured labor governance from C07 for an independently administered remedy.
Secured neighborhood participation from C16 through a protected review meeting.
Made durable City Hall funding commitments independent of every identity, article, and Vale conclusion.
reasoning_summary: The room has assembled separate evidence tracks for identity history, autonomous control, and the Vale incident, but none yields a definitive answer. A progressive identity best fits the changing human, institutional, and technical routes. Vale appears most plausibly to have been investigating R, while the compromised route and unresolved post-intervention gap leave fate insufficiently established. I choose meaningful oversight over donor protection.
